About Me

Experience

Computer Vision Engineer, Atlas Copco

2024 — present

Full-time role in machine vision applications. Engineering and Technical, Specialist level. Auburn Hills, Michigan, US.

Computer Vision Intern, Atlas Copco

2023 — 2024

One-year vision internship in Engineering and Technical at Atlas Copco. Auburn Hills, Michigan, US.

Robotics Intern, PaceRobotics®

2022 — 2022

Robotics engineering intern. Worked on Gazebo simulations of mobile robot platforms, mapping and navigation trials, and actuator control. Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.

Robotics Research Intern, Indian Institute of Technology Palakkad

2020 — 2021

Research intern in the collaborative project between IIT Kanpur and IIT Palakkad. Worked on visual perception and deep learning for an autonomous fruit harvesting robot; used PyBullet and Gazebo, Python and ROS.

Machine Learning Intern, Gas Turbine Research Establishment (DRDO)

2019 — 2019

One-month project internship in project management at GTRE, Defence R&D Organisation, Bangalore.

Research Assistant, Centre for Mobile Robotics, PSG College of Technology

2018 — 2020

Research in mobile robotics at the Centre for Mobile Robotics, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.

Education

M.S. Mechatronics, Robotics & Automation, Worcester Polytechnic Institute

2022 — 2024

Master's degree. Worcester, Massachusetts, US. Focus on mobile robotics, computer vision, deep learning, and motion planning.

B.E. Electronics and Communications, PSG Institute of Technology and Applied Research

2017 — 2021

Bachelor of Engineering. Focus on electronics and communications systems.
